name: Changingday
short_description: Former Glasgow VR studio, known for the autism-friendly adventure BLINNK and the Vacuum of Space
about: Changingday was a Glasgow-based VR game studio creating accessible, narrative-led experiences. Its best-known title is BLINNK and the Vacuum of Space, a slapstick adventure built with accessibility and neurodiverse players in mind — released on Steam, Meta Quest, and PlayStation VR2.
